name: LG V60 Thinq 5G Official PTA Approved 8GB Ram 128GB Rom Single Sim
description: Introducing the LG V60 ThinQ 5G (Single Display) – a smartphone that redefines the boundaries of connectivity and entertainment. This device combines the lightning-fast speeds of 5G, a stunning display, powerful performance, and versatile camera capabilities in a sleek single-screen design. Key Features: 1. 5G Connectivity: Experience the future of connectivity with 5G speeds, ensuring ultra-fast downloads, seamless streaming, and lag-free online experiences. 2. Immersive OLED Display: Enjoy a cinematic 6.8-inch OLED FullVision display that delivers vibrant colors, deep blacks, and stunning contrast, perfect for movies, gaming, and productivity. 3. Powerful Performance: Equipped with a Qualcomm Snapdragon 865 processor and 8GB of RAM, the LG V60 ThinQ 5G provides robust performance for multitasking, demanding apps, and gaming. 4. Versatile Camera System: Capture stunning photos and videos with the 64MP main camera, 13MP ultra-wide lens, and ToF (Time-of-Flight) sensor. The 10MP front camera ensures sharp selfies and video calls. 5. 8K Video Recording: Push the boundaries of mobile videography with 8K video recording capabilities, creating professional-quality videos. 6. Exceptional Audio: Immerse yourself in incredible audio with LG's 3D Sound Engine, ensuring that your music and videos sound amazing. Plus, it's Hi-Fi Quad DAC certified. 7. All-Day Battery: With a substantial 5,000mAh battery, the LG V60 ThinQ 5G ensures you stay powered up throughout your day, and when it's time to recharge, Qualcomm Quick Charge 4+ gets you back in action rapidly. 8. Water-Resistant Design: With an IP68 rating, this smartphone is water and dust-resistant, providing added durability and peace of mind. 9. 5G Gaming: Enjoy low-latency 5G gaming with the enhanced Game Launcher, delivering a smoother and more responsive gaming experience. The LG V60 ThinQ 5G (Single Display) offers a powerful blend of performance, connectivity, and multimedia capabilities in a single-screen design. Whether you're a tech enthusiast or a creative professional, this smartphone is designed to elevate your mobile experience. Experience the future of mobile technology with the LG V60 ThinQ 5G (Single Display) today. (Important note: This device has a high processor and high resolution display so heating up is common. name: Google Pixel 6 Pro 12GB Ram 128/256GB Rom
description: Design and BuildThe Google Pixel 6 Pro boasts a sleek and modern design with premium materials. Its sturdy construction is highlighted by a polished aluminum frame and a Gorilla Glass Victus back and front, offering both durability and a sophisticated look. The phone's dimensions are 163.9 x 75.9 x 8.9 mm, and it weighs 210 grams, providing a balanced feel in the hand.#### DisplayThe Pixel 6 Pro features a stunning 6.7-inch LTPO AMOLED display with a resolution of 1440 x 3120 pixels. This display supports HDR10+ for an enhanced viewing experience with vibrant colors and deep contrasts. It also offers a high refresh rate of 120Hz, ensuring smooth scrolling and an overall fluid user experience.#### PerformanceAt the heart of the Pixel 6 Pro is Google's custom-built Tensor processor, which is designed to deliver exceptional performance and efficiency. Paired with the Mali-G78 MP20 GPU, the device handles intensive tasks and gaming with ease. It comes with 12GB of RAM, allowing for seamless multitasking and swift app transitions.#### StorageThis variant of the Pixel 6 Pro offers a generous 128/256GB of internal storage, providing ample space for apps, media, and files. Please note that the device does not support expandable storage via microSD card.#### Camera SystemThe Google Pixel 6 Pro is equipped with a versatile and advanced camera system:- **Rear Cameras:** - **Main Camera:** 50 MP, f/1.9, 25mm (wide), 1/1.31", 1.2µm, dual pixel PDAF, Laser AF, OIS - **Telephoto Camera:** 48 MP, f/3.5, 104mm (telephoto), 1/2", 0.8µm, PDAF, OIS, 4x optical zoom - **Ultra-Wide Camera:** 12 MP, f/2.2, 17mm (ultra-wide), 1.25µm- **Front Camera:** - 11.1 MP, f/2.2, 20mm (ultra-wide), 1.22µmThis camera setup ensures high-quality photos and videos in various lighting conditions, with features like Night Sight, Super Res Zoom, and 4K video recording.#### Battery and ChargingThe device is powered by a robust 5003mAh battery, supporting fast charging up to 30W, ensuring quick recharges. It also supports 23W wireless charging and reverse wireless charging, allowing you to power other compatible devices.#### ConnectivityThe Google Pixel 6 Pro offers a comprehensive suite of connectivity options, including:- **SIM:** Single Nano-SIM and eSIM- **5G:** SA/NSA/Sub6/mmWave (availability depends on region)- **Wi-Fi:** 802.11 a/b/g/n/ac/6e, dual-band, Wi-Fi Direct- **Bluetooth:** 5.2, A2DP, LE, aptX HD- **NFC:** Yes- **USB:** USB Type-C 3.1#### Operating SystemThe phone runs on the latest Android 12 operating system, ensuring the latest features, security updates, and a clean, user-friendly interface.#### SecurityFor security, the Pixel 6 Pro incorporates an under-display fingerprint sensor and robust face unlock technology. It also benefits from Google's Titan M2 security chip, providing an additional layer of hardware security.#### Additional Features- **IP68 Dust/Water Resistance:** The device can withstand submersion in up to 1.5 meters of water for 30 minutes.- **Stereo Speakers:** For an immersive audio experience.- **Sensors:** Accelerometer, gyro, proximity, compass, barometer, and a color spectrum sensor.#### Color OptionsThe Pixel 6 Pro is available in several striking color options, including Stormy Black, Cloudy White, and Sorta Sunny, catering to various style preferences.#### ConclusionThe Google Pixel 6 Pro stands out with its cutting-edge technology, powerful performance, and innovative features, making it a top choice for those seeking a premium smartphone experience. Whether it's the high-quality display, advanced camera system, or robust performance, the Pixel 6 Pro delivers on all fronts.(Important note: This device has a high processor and high resolution display so heating up is common. No refund will be issued if the mobile seal (sticker) is removed)(Important Note 2: This is Not a Brand New Mobile. This is an Imported kit. Minor Used Sometimes Minor Scratches)(Important Note 3: Camera, Touch, LCD, Sensor No warranty. You will be checked before dispatching)

The phone features a compact 6.3-inch AMOLED display with a sharp FHD+ resolution (1080 x 2400) and a smooth 90Hz refresh rate. Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra (12GB RAM, 256GB Storage)
description: - Detailed Product DescriptionThe Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra is the pinnacle of Samsung’s flagship smartphone lineup, bringing cutting-edge technology, a superior camera system, and unparalleled performance. Built for users who demand the best in every category—whether it’s photography, performance, or display quality—the S24 Ultra delivers an all-around premium experience. Below is a comprehensive breakdown of the specifications and features of the Galaxy S24 Ultra:---1. Design & Build:Dimensions: 162.3 x 79.1 x 8.6 mmWeight: 234 gramsMaterials:Front: Corning Gorilla Glass Victus 2 (durable protection for drops and scratches).Back: Corning Gorilla Glass Victus 2.Frame: Armor Aluminum frame for added durability.Colors: Phantom Black, Phantom White, Green, and Burgundy.The Galaxy S24 Ultra showcases a premium design with sleek lines, curved edges, and a robust yet elegant build. The polished metal frame and matte glass finish create a sophisticated look while ensuring durability.---2. Display:Size: 6.8-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X displayResolution: 1440 x 3088 pixels (~500 ppi density), providing extremely sharp visuals.Aspect Ratio: 19.3:9Refresh Rate: 120Hz adaptive refresh rate, which adjusts between 1Hz and 120Hz based on the content, ensuring smooth scrolling while conserving battery life when appropriate.Brightness: Up to 2,500 nits peak brightness, making it one of the brightest displays in the market, ensuring excellent visibility under direct sunlight.HDR Support: HDR10+ support for enhanced color and contrast in supported content.Always-on Display: Yes, offering glanceable information like time, notifications, and more.Protection: Corning Gorilla Glass Victus 2 for strong protection against drops and scratches.---3. Performance:Processor: Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 (4 nm)Samsung’s choice of Qualcomm’s latest and greatest chipset ensures top-tier performance in AI tasks, gaming, and overall system fluidity. It excels in both speed and energy efficiency.GPU: Adreno 750 for improved graphics performance, delivering a smooth experience in gaming and high-demand applications.RAM: 12GB LPDDR5X RAM, providing ample multitasking capabilities for power users who switch between apps frequently or use demanding applications.Storage: 256GB UFS 4.0 (non-expandable), which offers ultra-fast read and write speeds for loading apps and files quickly.---4. Cameras:Rear Camera System:Primary Camera:Resolution: 200 MP, f/1.7Sensor Size: 1/1.3", 0.6µm pixelsOptical Image Stabilization (OIS): Yes, ensuring stable photos and videos even in motion.Laser Autofocus: Yes, providing precise focus in low-light and fast-moving scenarios.Ultra-Wide Camera:Resolution: 12 MP, f/2.2Field of View: 120°, ideal for capturing wide landscapes or group shots.Periscope Telephoto Camera:Resolution: 10 MP, f/4.9Optical Zoom: 10x optical zoomSuper Resolution Zoom: Up to 100x, allowing you to capture details from a distance with Samsung’s Space Zoom technology.Telephoto Camera:Resolution: 10 MP, f/2.4Optical Zoom: 3x optical zoom for versatile mid-range zoom photography.Key Camera Features:8K Video Recording: Up to 30fps, offering ultra-high-definition video capture.4K Video Recording: Up to 60fps with HDR10+ support for dynamic range and color.Nightography: Samsung’s enhanced night mode for clearer, more vibrant shots in low-light conditions.Expert RAW: Enables users to shoot in RAW format for professional-grade photography.Super Steady Mode: Improved video stabilization for shake-free video recording.Front Camera:Resolution: 12 MPAperture: f/2.2Field of View: 90°, wide enough for group selfies or vlogging.Key Features: Dual Pixel autofocus, 4K video at 60fps, AI-driven portrait enhancements, and face retouching options.---5. Battery:Capacity: 5000 mAh, providing all-day battery life even with heavy use.Charging:Wired Charging: 45W fast charging (able to reach 50% charge in around 30 minutes).Wireless Charging: 15W wireless charging (Qi-certified).Reverse Wireless Charging: 4.5W reverse wireless charging, allowing you to charge accessories like Galaxy Buds or other devices.Battery Saving Features: Adaptive Power Saving mode that optimizes power based on usage patterns.---6. Software:Operating System: Android 14 with One UI 6.0One UI 6.0 Features:Personalization: Enhanced customizations with deeper color palettes and theme options.Multitasking Improvements: Split screen and floating windows for improved productivity.Samsung DeX: Turn your Galaxy S24 Ultra into a desktop-like experience with Samsung DeX.Bixby Routines: AI-powered automation that adapts to your habits, offering custom shortcuts for apps and features.Updates: Samsung promises 4 years of major Android updates and 5 years of security updates.---7. Connectivity:5G Support:Supports Sub-6 GHz and mmWave 5G networks for ultra-fast download and upload speeds.Wi-Fi: Wi-Fi 7 (802.11be), ensuring faster internet speeds, low latency, and better coverage.Bluetooth: Bluetooth 5.3 with A2DP, LE for superior wireless audio quality and quick device pairing.NFC: Yes, for contactless payments and other NFC-related functionalities.USB Port: USB Type-C 3.2, enabling faster charging and data transfer.SIM Card: Dual SIM (Nano-SIM and eSIM), supporting multiple network connections.---8. Security:Fingerprint Sensor: Ultrasonic in-display fingerprint sensor, offering fast and reliable unlocking even in wet conditions.Face Unlock: Secure face recognition for an alternative biometric unlock method.Samsung Knox: Multi-layered security platform that protects sensitive information from malware and external threats.Secure Folder: A dedicated space on your device for extra-sensitive data.Updates: Samsung offers 5 years of security patches, ensuring your device stays protected from the latest threats.---9. Additional Features:IP Rating: IP68 water and dust resistance, protecting the phone from splashes, spills, and submersion in up to 1.5 meters of water for up to 30 minutes.S Pen Support: Built-in S Pen with improved latency for smooth handwriting and drawing. It’s ideal for note-taking, sketching, or even controlling the device remotely.Stereo Speakers: Tuned by AKG, delivering rich and immersive sound with Dolby Atmos support for a surround-sound experience.No 3.5mm Headphone Jack: Audio is delivered through the USB-C port or via Bluetooth.---10. Box Contents:Samsung Galaxy S24 UltraUSB-C to USB-C cableQuick start guideSIM ejector toolNo charger included, following Samsung’s sustainability initiative to reduce electronic waste.---Summary:The Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra (12GB RAM, 256GB Storage) is a powerhouse of performance and innovation. Featuring the Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 chipset, a stunning 6.8-inch Dynamic AMOLED display, and a revolutionary 200MP camera system, it is designed for users who want the best in every category. Whether you’re a photography enthusiast, mobile gamer, or productivity professional, the S24 Ultra delivers top-tier performance, long-lasting battery life, and premium design. With a host of features like S Pen support, 5G connectivity, and Samsung Knox security, it truly stands as one of the most complete smartphones available.

name: iPhone 11 128GB Dual SIM (Physical + eSIM) PTA Approved
description: The iPhone 11 128GB, featuring a dual PTA-approved physical SIM and eSIM capability, is a powerhouse of technology and innovation. This sleek device boasts a 6.1-inch Liquid Retina HD display, providing vibrant colors and sharp details for an immersive viewing experience. Under the hood, the iPhone 11 is powered by the A13 Bionic chip, ensuring lightning-fast performance and efficient multitasking. The 128GB internal storage capacity allows you to store a vast amount of photos, videos, and apps without worrying about running out of space. Capture stunning moments with the dual 12MP Ultra-Wide and Wide cameras on the rear, equipped with Night mode and 4K video recording. The front-facing 12MP TrueDepth camera supports Face ID for secure and convenient unlocking of your device. Connectivity is a breeze with 4G LTE support, and the dual SIM capability enables you to use both a physical SIM card and an eSIM simultaneously. This flexibility is ideal for those who travel frequently or need separate numbers for personal and professional use. name: Google Pixel 6 8GB Ram 128GB Rom
description: Google Pixel 6 (8GB RAM, 128GB Storage) - Detailed Product DescriptionThe Google Pixel 6 is a flagship smartphone that blends cutting-edge hardware with the best of Google's AI-driven software. Powered by Google's first custom-built chipset, Tensor, it redefines what you expect from a smartphone. Here’s a detailed breakdown of the specifications and features of the Pixel 6:---1. Design & Build:Dimensions: 158.6 x 74.8 x 8.9 mmWeight: 207 gramsMaterials:Front: Corning Gorilla Glass Victus (providing advanced drop and scratch resistance)Back: Glass with Corning Gorilla Glass 6Frame: Aluminum, which offers a premium and sturdy feel.Colors: Stormy Black, Kinda Coral, and Sorta Seafoam.The Pixel 6 sports a unique and bold design, featuring a camera bar across the back. Its sleek finish and vibrant color options give it a distinct appearance that stands out from the competition.---2. Display:Size: 6.4-inch OLED displayResolution: 1080 x 2400 pixels (~411 ppi density)Aspect Ratio: 20:9Refresh Rate: 90Hz for smooth scrolling and better motion clarity.HDR Support: HDR10+ for enhanced contrast and colors when viewing supported content.Protection: Corning Gorilla Glass Victus on the front offers strong protection against scratches and drops.Brightness: Supports high brightness mode for outdoor visibility.---3. Performance:Processor: Google Tensor chip (5 nm)This custom-built chip is designed to enhance AI and machine learning tasks, enabling real-time language translation, improved computational photography, and efficient multitasking.GPU: Mali-G78 MP20, offering a significant boost in gaming and graphical performance.RAM: 8GB LPDDR5 RAM, allowing for smooth multitasking and efficient performance across apps and games.Storage: 128GB UFS 3.1 internal storage (non-expandable), providing fast read/write speeds for quicker app launches and file transfers.---4. Cameras:Rear Camera System:Primary Camera:Resolution: 50 MPSensor Size: 1/1.31" with 1.2µm pixel sizeAperture: f/1.85Optical Image Stabilization (OIS): YesLaser Autofocus: Ensures fast and accurate focusing in low light.Ultra-Wide Camera:Resolution: 12 MPAperture: f/2.2Field of View: 114°Key Features:4K Video Recording: Up to 60fpsCinematic Pan: Helps in capturing smooth, cinematic-style video.Night Sight: Industry-leading low-light photography.Magic Eraser: AI-based tool that removes unwanted objects or people from photos.Real Tone: Offers more accurate skin tone rendering for all subjects.Front Camera:Resolution: 8 MPAperture: f/2.0Field of View: 84°Video Recording: 1080p at 30fps.Special Features: Face retouching, portrait lighting, and HDR.---5. Battery:Capacity: 4614 mAh, offering all-day battery life with typical usage.Charging:Wired Charging: 30W fast charging (capable of reaching 50% charge in approximately 30 minutes).Wireless Charging: 21W wireless charging via Pixel Stand (Qi-compatible).Reverse Wireless Charging: Yes, can charge accessories like Pixel Buds or other devices.Battery Saving Features: Adaptive Battery, which prioritizes power for your most-used apps and reduces consumption for apps you rarely use.---6. Software:Operating System: Android 12 (upgradable to future versions with regular updates directly from Google).Pixel-Exclusive Features:Live Translate: Provides real-time translation for messages, media, and in-person conversations.At a Glance: Gives you proactive information, like your next meeting or traffic updates, on your home screen.Material You Design: Dynamic theming that customizes the color of your system interface based on your wallpaper.---7. Connectivity:5G Support:Sub-6 GHz (supports most 5G networks for faster internet speeds).Wi-Fi: Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) with dual-band support for faster and more reliable connections.Bluetooth: Bluetooth 5.2 with A2DP, LE for high-quality audio and fast device pairing.NFC: Yes, for contactless payments via Google Pay.USB Port: USB Type-C 3.1 for fast charging, data transfer, and audio output.SIM Card: Dual SIM (Nano-SIM and eSIM).---8. Security:Fingerprint Sensor: In-display optical fingerprint sensor.Face Unlock: No.Titan M2 Security Chip: Ensures protection against hardware attacks, secures passwords, and protects sensitive data.Security Updates: Regular security updates for a minimum of 5 years.---9. Additional Features:IP Rating: IP68 water and dust resistance, allowing it to survive submersion in up to 1.5 meters of water for up to 30 minutes.Stereo Speakers: Dual stereo speakers for an immersive audio experience.No 3.5mm Headphone Jack: Audio is provided via the USB-C port or Bluetooth headphones.Summary:The Google Pixel 6 (8GB RAM, 128GB Storage) is a powerhouse that combines impressive hardware with Google's software smarts. Its custom Tensor chipset, standout camera features, fast performance, and sleek design make it a top contender in the premium smartphone market. It’s ideal for photography enthusiasts, power users, and anyone who appreciates seamless integration with Google’s ecosystem.(Important note: This device has a high processor and high resolution display so heating up is common. No refund will be issued if the mobile seal (sticker) is removed)(Important Note 2: This is Not a Brand New Mobile. This is an Imported kit. Minor Used Sometimes Minor Scratches)(Important Note 3: Camera, Touch, LCD, Sensor No warranty. You will be checked before dispatching)

description: Xiaomi, who's working on the latest Redmi A5, has just got the information that they are preparing the future Xiaomi's Redmi A5 handset. As we mentioned above, it is going to be the budget handset of the year due to its amazing specifications and pocket-friendly price bracket. The whole new Xiaomi Redmi A5's a massive 6.88-inch IPS LCD capacitive touchscreen display creating the HD+ resolution of 1080 x 1640 pixels. On the top of that display, there is a punch hole hiding an 8 MP sharp selfie shooter. Also, the Xiaomi A5 offers the single camera setup at the back that consists of 32 mega pixel sensor. Allowing you to enjoy seamless performance will be the powerful Unisoc T7250 (12 nm) processor fitted in the Xiaomi Redmi's A5 with the additional support of a 1.8 GHz Octa Core CPU. Moving into more details, we found that it is going to have 4GB of RAM and 64GB of internal memory capacity. A dedicated memory card slot will also be included. Making the new Xiaomi Redmi A5 perfect for its users is its massive 5200 mAh lithium battery in order to spend the entire day with its users on just one charge. name: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 3 12GB RAM 256 GB ROM || FOLDABLE MOBILE PHONE || ONE YEAR BRAND WARRANTY
description: Samsung is launching a new Galaxy Z that has got the moniker Fold 3 at the end.   The company has been experimenting with the folding form factor for over a year now.   The first Galaxy Fold was a proof of concept more than anything but the new Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 2 added more polish to it, tweaked the design, and made the original Fold into something practical, not just a gimmicky party trick.   The third generation of this smartphone series is in the works and the rumor mill has already leaked us a core feature of the device, a pop-out keyboard housed inside the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 3.   This new folding handset will be empowered by one of the latest chipsets available for the smartphones in the market that is called Snapdragon 888 5G (5 nm). Samsung's Galaxy Z Fold 3 has got a powerful processor of 3.09Ghz Octa-Core which will boost up this chipset, and generate more power.   This is the chipset that carries flagship capability among all the chipsets and will enhance the performance of the coming smartphone. Samsung Galaxy Z's having a 7.6 Inches massive screen size, the users of this device will be enjoying using it.   There is a Foldable Dynamic AMOLED 2X Capacitive Touchscreen, with a full HD resolution of 1536 x 2208 Pixels. There is a massive RAM capacity in this new Galaxy Z Fold 3 by Samsung of 12 gigabytes that is something extraordinary.   The internal storage capacity of the coming smartphone is 256 gigabytes that are a huge amount of built-in storage that will provide the user with enough space to place its data on the device for future use.   The coming smartphone Samsung Z Fold 3 is equipped with a Triple camera setup at the rear.   The main sensor will be 12 megapixels. The remaining lenses are yet to confirm.   The front-facing camera of Samsung Galaxy's Z Fold 3 is 10 MP + 4 MP.   If we talk about the battery of the Galaxy Z Fold 3 so that is also a massive one and it will offer 4400 mAh capacity, which is more than enough for your daily use. In Z Fold 3 there is a Fast battery charging of 25W, Fast wireless charging of 10W. Instead of ordinary LCD panels LG is going to introduce MLCD for its upcoming G7 which is going to raise stakes high for other brands by rising the brightness level up to 800 nits that was never achieved before. LG bring G7 with many special features and one of them is its IP68 certification which is going to resist against dust particles and now you can throw your phone in water for almost 30 minutes with this fear that G7 may get hurt with any kind of smudge. Technology is perfecting itself but no matter how much tech is best its storage ability matter a lot. description: PTA Approved  1 Year Official Brand Warranty The Samsung Galaxy A07 is a budget-friendly 4G smartphone released in late August 2025, featuring a smooth 90Hz display, a durable build with IP54 dust and splash resistance, and a long-lasting battery. It is available in Black, Light Violet, and Green. Processor: A MediaTek Helio G99 6nm octa-core processor offers smoother performance and better power efficiency compared to previous A-series phones. Operating system: It comes with Android 15 and Samsung's One UI 7 out of the box. Software updates: Samsung has committed to providing up to six generations of OS upgrades and six years of security updates. RAM and storage: The phone is available in several configurations, including 4GB of RAM and 128GB of internal storage. Expandable storage: A dedicated microSD card slot allows for up to 2TB of expandable storage.  Display: The 6.7-inch HD+ PLS LCD screen has a 90Hz refresh rate, providing smooth scrolling and viewing for everyday tasks. Design: The slim, 7.6mm body has flat edges and a plastic back. Water and dust resistance: An IP54 rating means the phone can withstand dust and splashes of water. Biometrics: For security, the phone features a side-mounted fingerprint sensor. Rear camera: A dual-camera system includes a 50MP main lens with autofocus and a 2MP depth sensor for portrait shots. Front camera: For selfies and video calls, the phone is equipped with an 8MP front-facing camera. Video recording: The camera can record video at 1080p resolution at 30fps. Capacity: A large 5,000mAh battery provides a full day or more of typical usage. Charging: It supports 25W fast charging via a USB-C port, and a compatible charging brick may be included in the box depending on the region.

Processor: A MediaTek Helio G99 6nm octa-core processor offers smoother performance and better power efficiency compared to previous A-series phones. Operating system: It comes with Android 15 and Samsung's One UI 7 out of the box. Software updates: Samsung has committed to providing up to six generations of OS upgrades and six years of security updates. RAM and storage: The phone is available in several configurations, including 4GB of RAM and 64GB/128GB of internal storage. Expandable storage: A dedicated microSD card slot allows for up to 2TB of expandable storage.  Display: The 6.7-inch HD+ PLS LCD screen has a 90Hz refresh rate, providing smooth scrolling and viewing for everyday tasks. Design: The slim, 7.6mm body has flat edges and a plastic back. Water and dust resistance: An IP54 rating means the phone can withstand dust and splashes of water. Biometrics: For security, the phone features a side-mounted fingerprint sensor. Rear camera: A dual-camera system includes a 50MP main lens with autofocus and a 2MP depth sensor for portrait shots. Front camera: For selfies and video calls, the phone is equipped with an 8MP front-facing camera. Video recording: The camera can record video at 1080p resolution at 30fps. Capacity: A large 5,000mAh battery provides a full day or more of typical usage. Charging: It supports 25W fast charging via a USB-C port, and a compatible charging brick may be included in the box depending on the region.

name: Motorola Moto Z4 4GB Ram 128GB Rom NON PTA
description: Introducing the Motorola Moto Z4 – a smartphone designed for those who demand versatility and cutting-edge technology in one sleek package. With modular capabilities and impressive features, the Moto Z4 is here to redefine your mobile experience. Key Features: 1. Moto Mods Compatibility: The Moto Z4 supports a range of Moto Mods, allowing you to instantly transform your smartphone into a powerful camera, a speaker system, a projector, and more. Customize your device to suit your needs. 2. Stunning OLED Display: Immerse yourself in a 6.4-inch OLED Full HD+ display that offers rich colors and deep blacks, making every video, game, and photo come to life. 3. Impressive Camera: Capture stunning photos with the 48MP main camera, which features Quad Pixel technology for exceptional low-light performance. The 25MP front camera ensures sharp and vibrant selfies. 4. All-Day Battery Life: With a 3,600mAh battery, the Moto Z4 keeps you powered up throughout the day, and when it's time to recharge, TurboPower gets you back to full capacity quickly. 5. Reliable Performance: Equipped with a Qualcomm Snapdragon 675 processor and 4GB of RAM, the Moto Z4 handles multitasking and demanding apps with ease. 6. Near-Stock Android: Enjoy a near-stock Android experience with minimal bloatware and useful Moto enhancements for a seamless user interface. 7. AI-Powered Features: Benefit from AI-driven capabilities like face unlock and intelligent camera features that enhance your smartphone experience. 8. On-Screen Fingerprint Sensor: Securely unlock your device with the convenience of an on-screen fingerprint sensor. 9. Expandable Storage: Store all your photos, videos, and apps with ease thanks to the expandable storage option. 10. Water-Repellent Design: The Moto Z4 is designed to withstand splashes and light rain, ensuring your device is protected in various conditions. The Motorola Moto Z4 is a modular masterpiece, offering the flexibility to adapt to your changing needs. With a stunning display, impressive camera, and reliable performance, it's the ideal choice for those who crave both innovation and practicality in their smartphone. Elevate your mobile experience with the Moto Z4 today. (Important note: This device has a high processor and high resolution display so heating up is common. No refund will issue if the mobile seal (sticker) is removed)

name: Mi 11 Ultra NON PTA (12GB RAM, 256GB Storage)
description: The Xiaomi Mi 11 Ultra is Xiaomi’s ultimate flagship device, designed to push the boundaries of mobile technology. Packed with top-of-the-line specifications, including an advanced triple camera system, a stunning AMOLED display, and a high-performance chipset, the Mi 11 Ultra is engineered for users who demand nothing less than the best in every aspect. Here’s a detailed breakdown of all the specifications and features:---1. Design & Build:Dimensions: 164.3 x 74.6 x 8.4 mmWeight: 234 gramsMaterials:Front: Corning Gorilla Glass Victus for superior protection against scratches and drops.Back: Ceramic back, providing a premium feel and enhanced durability.Frame: Aluminum frame for added strength and style.Colors: Ceramic White and Ceramic Black.The Mi 11 Ultra is designed with a premium ceramic body and a sleek aluminum frame, offering both durability and a luxurious aesthetic. The curved edges and slim profile make it comfortable to hold while exuding elegance.---2. Display:Size: 6.81-inch AMOLED displayResolution: 1440 x 3200 pixels (~515 ppi density), offering ultra-sharp and vibrant visuals with impressive detail.Aspect Ratio: 20:9Refresh Rate: 120Hz refresh rate for smooth scrolling, animations, and an enhanced gaming experience.Touch Sampling Rate: 480Hz touch sampling rate for ultra-responsive touch input, ideal for gaming.Brightness: Peak brightness of up to 1,700 nits, ensuring clear visibility even under direct sunlight.HDR Support: HDR10+ certified, delivering richer contrast and brighter highlights when watching compatible content.Protection: Corning Gorilla Glass Victus protects the display from scratches and drops.Secondary Display: 1.1-inch AMOLED screen on the rear, which can be used to check notifications, battery status, and even take selfies using the rear cameras.---3. Performance:Processor: Qualcomm Snapdragon 888 (5 nm)The Snapdragon 888 chipset ensures top-tier performance, handling multitasking, gaming, and heavy applications effortlessly with improved energy efficiency and AI capabilities.GPU: Adreno 660 for exceptional graphics performance, perfect for demanding games and graphics-intensive apps.RAM: 12GB LPDDR5 RAM for seamless multitasking, ensuring apps load quickly and switch smoothly without lag.Storage: 256GB UFS 3.1 storage, providing blazing-fast data transfer speeds and ample space for photos, videos, apps, and files.Note: No microSD card slot for expandable storage.---4. Cameras:Rear Camera System:Primary Camera:Resolution: 50 MP, f/1.95, 1/1.12" sensor size, 1.4µm pixel size, offering incredible detail and excellent low-light performance.Optical Image Stabilization (OIS): Yes, ensuring sharp and stable images even when in motion.Ultra-Wide Camera:Resolution: 48 MP, f/2.2, 128° field of view, enabling wide-angle shots without losing quality.Periscope Telephoto Camera:Resolution: 48 MP, f/4.1Optical Zoom: 5x optical zoom for distant subjects.Super Zoom: Up to 120x digital zoom with AI enhancements for ultra-zoomed shots.Key Camera Features:8K Video Recording: Up to 24fps, capturing ultra-high-definition footage.4K Video Recording: Up to 60fps with HDR10+ support for superior dynamic range and color accuracy.Night Mode: Enhanced night mode for clear, vivid images in low-light environments.Dual Pixel PDAF & Laser AF: Fast and precise autofocus for photos and videos.AI-Enhanced Photography: Features like AI scene detection, portrait mode, and ultra night video for enhanced photos in all conditions.Secondary Display Camera Mode: The rear display can be used as a viewfinder for selfies, leveraging the superior rear cameras for sharper, higher-quality self-portraits.Front Camera:Resolution: 20 MP, f/2.2Key Features: AI-beautification, portrait mode, and HDR capabilities for enhanced selfies and video calls.Video Recording: 1080p at 30fps.---5. Battery:Capacity: 5000 mAh, providing all-day battery life even with heavy usage.Charging:Wired Charging: 67W fast charging, capable of charging the device to 100% in about 36 minutes.Wireless Charging: 67W fast wireless charging, one of the fastest wireless charging capabilities on the market, reaching 100% in 39 minutes.Reverse Wireless Charging: 10W reverse wireless charging, useful for charging other devices like earbuds or wearables.Battery Saving Features: AI-driven power management that optimizes battery usage based on your habits and app usage.---6. Software:Operating System: MIUI 12.5 based on Android 11, upgradable to newer versions of MIUI and Android.MIUI 12.5 Features:Enhanced Privacy Controls: With granular permissions and features like clipboard access restrictions and secure storage for private files.Customizable Always-On Display: Take advantage of the vibrant AMOLED display to customize always-on features.Multitasking Features: Floating windows and improved split-screen capabilities.Performance Enhancements: Faster response times and better memory management for a smoother experience.---7. Connectivity:5G Support:Supports both Sub-6 GHz and mmWave 5G for ultra-fast internet speeds and lower latency on supported networks.Wi-Fi: Wi-Fi 6E (802.11ax), offering faster speeds, better coverage, and reduced latency in crowded areas.Bluetooth: Bluetooth 5.2, ensuring fast and reliable wireless connections for headphones and other peripherals.NFC: Yes, for contactless payments via Google Pay and other NFC-enabled services.USB Port: USB Type-C 2.0 for charging and data transfer.SIM Card: Dual SIM (Nano-SIM, dual standby), allowing for the use of two networks simultaneously.---8. Security:Fingerprint Sensor: In-display optical fingerprint sensor, fast and reliable for unlocking your device securely.Face Unlock: AI-powered face recognition for an additional biometric unlocking method.Privacy Features: Built-in privacy controls through MIUI 12.5, offering advanced permissions and secure storage options.---9. Additional Features:IP Rating: IP68 dust and water resistance, allowing the device to withstand submersion in up to 1.5 meters of water for 30 minutes.Stereo Speakers: Tuned by Harman Kardon, providing a rich and immersive audio experience with dual stereo speakers and Dolby Atmos support.IR Blaster: Yes, allowing the phone to control home appliances like TVs and air conditioners.No 3.5mm Headphone Jack: Audio output through USB-C or wireless Bluetooth headphones.---Summary:The Xiaomi Mi 11 Ultra (12GB RAM, 256GB Storage) is designed for users who demand the ultimate smartphone experience. Its powerful Snapdragon 888 processor, cutting-edge triple camera system with 120x zoom, and stunning 120Hz AMOLED display ensure top-tier performance in every category. Whether you're capturing professional-grade photos, enjoying fast 5G speeds, or watching HDR10+ content, the Mi 11 Ultra is built to impress. With features like ultra-fast 67W wireless charging, IP68 water resistance, and the secondary rear display, the Mi 11 Ultra redefines what a flagship smartphone can offer.(Important note: This device has a high processor and high resolution display so heating up is common. No refund will be issued if the mobile seal (sticker) is removed)(Important Note 2: This is Not a Brand New Mobile. This is an Imported kit. Minor Used Sometimes Minor Scratches)(Important Note 3: Camera, Touch, LCD, Sensor No warranty. You will be checked before dispatching)

name: Motorola Moto Edge Plus 2020 12GB Ram 256GB Rom Single Sim PTA Approved
description: Introducing the cutting-edge technology and exquisite design of the Motorola Moto Edge Plus 2020, now available with an impressive 12GB RAM and a capacious 256GB ROM, all wrapped up in a sleek single SIM configuration. The 108MP main sensor delivers sharp and vibrant photos, while the ultra-wide lens expands your perspective, and the telephoto lens brings your subjects closer, even from a distance. *Long-lasting Battery:*Equipped with a robust 5,000mAh battery, the Moto Edge Plus ensures you stay powered up throughout the day and beyond. Whether you're streaming, gaming, or working, you'll have the freedom to do more without constantly searching for a power outlet. Blazing-Fast Connectivity:Stay connected like never before with 5G capabilities. Enjoy lightning-fast download and upload speeds, seamless video conferencing, and buffer-free streaming. The Motorola Moto Edge Plus makes lag a thing of the past. *Sleek Design:*Designed to impress, the Moto Edge Plus features a sleek and modern design that's not only visually striking but also ergonomic. The waterfall display seamlessly merges with the metal and glass body, creating a device that's as comfortable to hold as it is stylish. *PTA Approved:*Rest easy knowing that the Motorola Moto Edge Plus 2020 is officially approved by the PTA, ensuring compliance with all regulatory standards in Pakistan. You can enjoy a hassle-free connection experience without any concerns. Elevate your smartphone experience with the Motorola Moto Edge Plus 2020. name: Redmi A5      4GB RAM  +  64GB  Rom  +   32MP Back Camera  5200 mAh Battery  +  1 Year Brand Warranty
description: Xiaomi, who's working on the latest Redmi A5, has just got the information that they are preparing the future Xiaomi's Redmi A5 handset. As we mentioned above, it is going to be the budget handset of the year due to its amazing specifications and pocket-friendly price bracket. The whole new Xiaomi Redmi A5's a massive 6.88-inch IPS LCD capacitive touchscreen display creating the HD+ resolution of 1080 x 1640 pixels. On the top of that display, there is a punch hole hiding an 8 MP sharp selfie shooter. Also, the Xiaomi A5 offers the single camera setup at the back that consists of 32 mega pixel sensor. Allowing you to enjoy seamless performance will be the powerful Unisoc T7250 (12 nm) processor fitted in the Xiaomi Redmi's A5 with the additional support of a 1.8 GHz Octa Core CPU. Moving into more details, we found that it is going to have 4GB of RAM and 64GB of internal memory capacity. A dedicated memory card slot will also be included. Making the new Xiaomi Redmi A5 perfect for its users is its massive 5200 mAh lithium battery in order to spend the entire day with its users on just one charge. name: SONY Xperia XZ3 - 4GB /64GB- Official PTA Approved - Original & Water Resistant
description: A beautiful 6.0-inch P-OLED HDR display with sharp 1440 x 2880 resolution Powerful Qualcomm Snapdragon 845 processor for smooth performance 4GB of RAM for multitasking 64GB of storage, expandable with a microSDXC card Long-lasting 3330mAh battery with wireless charging support A 19MP rear camera with 4K HDR video recording and impressive 960fps slow-motion, complemented by a 13MP front camera Android 9.0 Pie software, upgradeable to Android 10 The Xperia XZ3 impressed with its display, performance, and battery life. However, some users felt the camera was average and the design a little plain. Overall, the Xperia XZ3 was a great phone in 2018. With newer models available, it might be worth considering them if you prioritize the latest features or the absolute best camera. If you value a stunning display, strong performance, and long battery life, the Xperia XZ3 remains a good option. Single SIM  Condition : Fresh Imported Stock ( But not Box Pack) While it's a few years old now, the Xperia XZ3 is still a solid phone with a lot to offer. If you're looking for a phone with a great screen, long battery life, and a good camera, the XZ3 is a great choice

description: Introducing the Motorola Moto Edge+ 2022, a powerhouse of performance and innovation. Packed with cutting-edge features, this smartphone redefines your mobile experience. **Display:** Immerse yourself in the stunning 6.7-inch AMOLED display, delivering vibrant colors and sharp details. The edge-to-edge design provides an expansive viewing area for an unparalleled visual experience. **Performance:** Equipped with a robust 12GB RAM, the Moto Edge+ 2022 ensures seamless multitasking, allowing you to switch between apps effortlessly. The Qualcomm Snapdragon processor ensures top-notch speed and responsiveness for smooth performance in every task. **Storage:** Store all your memories, apps, and files without a worry with the generous 256GB internal storage. The Moto Edge+ 2022 provides ample space for your photos, videos, and applications, ensuring you have everything you need at your fingertips. **Camera:** Capture life's moments in stunning detail with the advanced camera system. The Moto Edge+ 2022 features a high-resolution main camera, offering exceptional clarity. Whether it's day or night, the camera performs exceptionally well, ensuring your photos are Instagram-worthy every time. **Single SIM Convenience:** Simplify your mobile experience with the single SIM card slot. The Moto Edge+ 2022 offers a streamlined, single SIM setup for those who prefer a more straightforward approach to connectivity. **Battery:** Say goodbye to frequent charging with the long-lasting battery life of the Moto Edge+ 2022. The robust battery ensures you stay connected throughout the day, and when it's time to recharge, the fast-charging feature gets you back in action in no time. **Connectivity:** Stay connected with 5G capabilities, ensuring high-speed internet for streaming, gaming, and browsing. The Moto Edge+ 2022 also supports the latest Bluetooth and Wi-Fi standards for seamless connectivity. **Design:** Crafted with precision, the Moto Edge+ 2022 boasts a sleek and modern design that not only looks great but feels comfortable in your hand. The premium build quality reflects Motorola's commitment to both aesthetics and durability. **Software:** Experience the latest Android operating system, complemented by Motorola's user-friendly enhancements. Enjoy a smooth and intuitive interface that enhances your overall user experience. In summary, the Motorola Moto Edge+ 2022 with 12GB RAM, 256GB ROM, and a single SIM card slot combines powerful performance, ample storage, and a sleek design to elevate your smartphone experience. Whether you're a multitasker, photography enthusiast, or tech aficionado, this device is designed to meet your every need. description: Xiaomi, who's working on the latest Redmi A5, has just got the information that they are preparing the future Xiaomi's Redmi A5 handset. As we mentioned above, it is going to be the budget handset of the year due to its amazing specifications and pocket-friendly price bracket. The whole new Xiaomi Redmi A5's a massive 6.88-inch IPS LCD capacitive touchscreen display creating the HD+ resolution of 1080 x 1640 pixels. On the top of that display, there is a punch hole hiding an 8 MP sharp selfie shooter. Also, the Xiaomi A5 offers the single camera setup at the back that consists of 32 mega pixel sensor. Allowing you to enjoy seamless performance will be the powerful Unisoc T7250 (12 nm) processor fitted in the Xiaomi Redmi's A5 with the additional support of a 1.8 GHz Octa Core CPU. Moving into more details, we found that it is going to have 4GB of RAM and 64GB of internal memory capacity. A dedicated memory card slot will also be included. Making the new Xiaomi Redmi A5 perfect for its users is its massive 5200 mAh lithium battery in order to spend the entire day with its users on just one charge. Powerhouse Performance: Powered by the Qualcomm Snapdragon 888 chipset and up to 8GB of RAM, the OnePlus 9 ensures lightning-fast app launches and seamless multitasking. 3. Hasselblad Collaboration: Experience professional-grade photography with the Hasselblad camera system, featuring a 48MP main sensor, 50MP ultra-wide lens, and 2MP monochrome sensor. Capture lifelike images and 8K videos with stunning clarity. 4. Warp Charge 65T: Say goodbye to long charging times. The OnePlus 9 supports Warp Charge 65T, providing a day's power in just 15 minutes. The 4,500mAh battery keeps you going all day. 5. OxygenOS: Enjoy a clean and customizable user interface with OxygenOS, offering a smooth and bloatware-free Android experience. 6. 5G Connectivity: Stay connected to the world at blazing-fast speeds with 5G connectivity, ensuring you're ready for the future of mobile technology. 7. Sleek Design: Crafted with precision and elegance, the OnePlus 9 features a slim profile and Gorilla Glass protection for durability and style. 8. Dual Stereo Speakers: Experience immersive audio with dual stereo speakers, delivering clear and powerful sound quality. Whether you're a photography enthusiast, a mobile gamer, or simply demand the best from your smartphone, the OnePlus 9 is designed to meet and exceed your expectations. Elevate your mobile experience with the OnePlus 9 today. (Important note: This device has a high processor and high resolution display so heating up is common. No refund will issue if the mobile seal (sticker) is removed)

name: Samsung Galaxy A07 - 6.7'' Display 4GB RAM 64GB ROM 50MP Rear Camera 5000mAh Battery PTA Approved 1 Year Official Brand Warranty
description: PTA Approved  1 Year Official Brand Warranty The Samsung Galaxy A07 is a budget-friendly 4G smartphone released in late August 2025, featuring a smooth 90Hz display, a durable build with IP54 dust and splash resistance, and a long-lasting battery. It is available in Black, Light Violet, and Green. Processor: A MediaTek Helio G99 6nm octa-core processor offers smoother performance and better power efficiency compared to previous A-series phones. Operating system: It comes with Android 15 and Samsung's One UI 7 out of the box. Software updates: Samsung has committed to providing up to six generations of OS upgrades and six years of security updates. RAM and storage: The phone is available in several configurations, including 4GB of RAM and 64GB of internal storage. Expandable storage: A dedicated microSD card slot allows for up to 2TB of expandable storage.  Display: The 6.7-inch HD+ PLS LCD screen has a 90Hz refresh rate, providing smooth scrolling and viewing for everyday tasks. Design: The slim, 7.6mm body has flat edges and a plastic back. Water and dust resistance: An IP54 rating means the phone can withstand dust and splashes of water. Biometrics: For security, the phone features a side-mounted fingerprint sensor. Rear camera: A dual-camera system includes a 50MP main lens with autofocus and a 2MP depth sensor for portrait shots. Front camera: For selfies and video calls, the phone is equipped with an 8MP front-facing camera. Video recording: The camera can record video at 1080p resolution at 30fps. Capacity: A large 5,000mAh battery provides a full day or more of typical usage. Charging: It supports 25W fast charging via a USB-C port, and a compatible charging brick may be included in the box depending on the region.
